SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENTLAND, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOREN, LEONARD KOH, JAMES ABACUS REALTY $816.67 PRINCIPAL, $7.35 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $904.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WOREN, LEONARD KOH, JAMES ABACUS REALTY
